ja.tool.description: Read file contents (up to 20000000 bytes). Partial reading is possible by specifying start_line and max_lines.
ja.tool.system_prompt:
Read file contents.
- For large files, partial reading using start_line/max_lines is recommended.
- Newlines are normalized automatically.
ja.param.filename.description: Path of the file to read.
ja.param.start_line.description: Line number to start reading from (1-based). Default is 1.
ja.param.max_lines.description: Maximum number of lines to read. If null, read to EOF.
ja.param.head_lines.description: Number of lines to read from the beginning. Cannot be used with tail_lines.
ja.param.tail_lines.description: Number of lines to read from the end. Cannot be used with head_lines.
ja.err.filename_missing: [read_file error] filename/path が指定されていません
ja.err.dual_lines: [read_file error] head_lines and tail_lines cannot be specified together
ja.err.out_of_range: (file has only {count} lines, start_line {start_line} is out of range)
